narrative: US-Iran peace hopes drive a broad dollar retreat as oil crashes to $95 — DXY -0.24%; gold higher +0.00%; equities +0.37%; VIX 16.6. USD/JPY consolidates at 158.91 as geopolitical risk premiums compress, though the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage remains the structural anchor. AUD/USD firms to 0.7173 on the risk-on shift, supported by a -+300bp carry favor for AUD and a +2.60σ unemployment rate shock. Watch the RBNZ rate decision at 02:00 UTC on May 27.
